ksa_text: Conduct comprehensive quality assurance activities throughout the data and AI system lifecycle, including testing, monitoring, and compliance verification.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to monitor system operations and react to events in response to triggers and/or observation of trends or unusual activity.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

top_anchors.element_label: Ability to monitor system operations and react to events in response to triggers and/or observation of trends or unusual activity.
Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-014 (Data Quality/Task) scores 0.422 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.422) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA covers pipeline observability and monitoring — a core operational responsibility for data engineers. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with in_scope scope, EU AI Act signal (0.422), and Data Quality handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does EU AI Act signal (0.422) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual Data Engineer hiring requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 60-85% of senior Data Engineer job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at IC-to-senior IC level across major platforms.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.422 is market-validated for Data Engineer IC/senior IC. Final decision: include.
